messages.author: Ceres Station 🌑
messages.text: When I go home, it'd be neat to auto-resume the best working paths without having to flood-discover all my DM contacts. Same goes for work; saved best paths there would also be nice. This could reduce util and improve UX. Not entirely sure if software or firmware request. added bonus could be the companion position updates too when a "home" or "work" or .. location is selected.
messages.content_html: When I go home, it'd be neat to auto-resume the best working paths without having to flood-discover all my DM contacts. Same goes for work; saved best paths there would also be nice. This could reduce util and improve UX. Not entirely sure if software or firmware request. added bonus could be the companion position updates too when a "home" or "work" or .. location is selected.

messages.author: ded (SalishMesh)
messages.text: Meshcore open has something like this already: If you put it in auto path mode between retries it will alternate between flood and the best paths with the most successes. It will store up to 100 paths per contact.
messages.content_html: Meshcore open has something like this already: If you put it in auto path mode between retries it will alternate between flood and the best paths with the most successes. It will store up to 100 paths per contact.
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:

When I go home, it'd be neat to auto-resume the best working paths without having to flood-discover all my DM contacts. Same goes for work; saved best paths there would also be nice. This could reduce util and improve UX. Not entirely sure if software or firmware request. added bonus could be the companion position updates too when a "home" or "work" or .. location is selected.
